name: UBA : User Installing Suspicious Application
notes:
Detects application installation events and then alerts when suspicious applications are seen.

Note: Populate the reference set "UBA : Authorized Applications" with the application names that are authorized in the organization.
The rule "UBA : Populate Authorized Applications" can be enabled for a short duration to populate this reference set.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Application or Service Installed or Modified
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Application or Service Installed or Modified, UBA : Application or Service Installed
when any of ProgramName (custom) are contained in any of UBA : Authorized Applications - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Installing Suspicious Application on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Application or Service Installed or Modified, UBA : Application or Service Installed
AND NOT when any of ProgramName (custom) are contained in any of UBA : Authorized Applications - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : User Installing Suspicious Application
Event description: senseValue=15,senseDesc='Detects application installation events and then alerts when suspicious applications are seen.',usecase_id='24b8afa5-7748-45e9-82e8-641968e4b183'
